Our philosophy
Let's do things with passion and do them better!
This is what we follow in achieving our goals. We are a Slovak family manufacturing company and we specialize in the production of seals, insulation, acoustic and self-adhesive parts exactly according to the requirements of our customers.
We analyze the problem, recommend and propose a suitable and functional solution so that you can devote yourself to what you enjoy.
We support you from the development up to the series.
More

ABOUT US
Christmas 2026
About us
We are a
Slovak family company
operating on the market
since 2008
Ever since the founding of the company,
we have been fascinated by working with a number of materials, looking for ways to use them and developing solutions that work.
We have been working with a number of flexible materials for many years - they are mainly felt, non-woven fabrics, foams, rubbers, foils, adhesive tapes and other technical materials. We combine them, process them with innovative technologies and give them the final shape.
Our passion is
converting.
We process
various materials, combine them and develop functional solutions
that serve mainly as:
acoustic and anti-vibration parts and tiles,
seals and insulation,
joining parts (eliminating fixed joints),
assembly and adhesive parts,
filling and covering components,
design and decorative solutions,
protective parts,
visual and non-visual parts,
damping parts and the like.
Every project
we work on is
unique
to us. We approach it individually in order
to achieve the most effective solution that will work in the long run.
Are you looking for a
partner you can always rely on
? Thanks to our
expertise, flexibility, technical know-how, innovative technologies and proactive customer service
, we will do everything to ensure that
you can focus on what you enjoy.
Benefits
Development of a functional solution
from
prototype up to the series
Technical support
Flexibility
Innovative technologies
Fast delivery
Satisfied customers all over the world
Your success = our satisfaction
Certificates
REFIMA
is certificated according to
ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 16949:2016
You can download the certificates here:
ISO 9001
ISO 16949
Technology
Production is based on
innovative technologies
, in which we invest every year and which constantly expand our capabilities.
We mainly use the following technologies:
CNC cutting,
surface, rotary and laser cutting,
lamination,
cutting,
winding on spools.

PRODUCTS
Christmas 2026
The products that we offer
WOOL FELT
Wool felt is an organic product with the possibility of biological disposal that is safe for the environment.
Sheep wool, eventually wool fibres, are gradually felted and compressed by moisture, heat, and abrasion during the manufacturing process, until a homogenous fabric is created, called wool felt.
It is possible to use a selection of wool felt products in nearly all branches of industry, such as:
sealing
material
insulation material
polishing
material
lubrication
material
Shop now
Selected products
Felt in rolls
Polishing felt
Felted shaped slices
Felt boards
Felt strip and wire
Felt rolls
NEEDLE FELT
Needle felt can be produced from standard synthetic fibres like Polyester or Polypropylene, but also from special heat-resistant fibres like Nomex, Aramid, or Kevlar. Synthetic fibres are mechanically entangled by barbed needles and in such a way a felt fleece is created.
Needle felt characteristics:
long-term durability
abrasion and tear resistance
rot resistance
UV radiation resistance
Shop now
Selected products
Technical needle felt in rolls
Needle felt in rolls and rings
Self-adhesive felt
DECORATION FELT
Due to the high colorfulness and elegant design is a colorful decorative felt the best material for the design and decoration purposes. We offer decorative color felt made of wool, polyester and viscose in thicknesses from 1 mm.
Decorative felt can be used for example:
design accessories production
decoration of exhibition stands, packaging and showcases
interior design
toys and hobby products
Shop now
Selected products
Feltro - 1 mm 100% viscose
PECF 100 - 1,1 mm 100% Polyester
FELTILE - 2, 3, 5 mm 100 Marino wooll
TEXTIL FELT 170 - 1 mm 100% Polyester
TEXTIL FELT 500 - 3 mm 100% Polyester
TEXTIL FELT 1000 5 mm 100% polyester
ANTIBACTERIAL PROTECTIVE FILMS
Our protective films have a patented hard coating that
destroys 99.9% of bacteria and pathogens
. This hard coat contains
innovative nanotechnology
that prevents further spread and colonization of pathogens.
PROTECTION
PLUS+
coating destroys pathogens such as MRSA, E-coli, SARS and other virulent bacteria, significantly reducing the risk of cross-contamination.
As touch screen devices are now common in supermarkets, schools, hospitals, restaurants, fast food stalls and ticket machines, antibacterial protective film can help reduce the risk of cross-contamination in these areas and keep staff and the public safe from harmful bacteria on touch screens displays.
Properties of protective foils:
Antibacterial
Without leaving fingerprints
Scratch resistant
Anti-reflective (reflect light)
Crystal clear
Privacy protection
Selected products from this material
Matt antibacterial f
